candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and preferred candidate; matches top-line revenue concept.

variables.notes: Selected explicit revenue line from candidates. Although 'Net sales' also appears in the preview, 'Total Revenue' is in the candidate list and is the appropriate reported top-line.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs among candidates; appears as main cost line directly below revenue.

variables.notes: Chosen as the direct cost line consistent with cost of sales/COGS.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component; personnel-related expense and not a total/subtotal.
Operating overhead component; broad SG&A-type bucket and not a total/subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization supplemental line, but this is amortization and supplemental rather than core SG&A overhead.
Balance sheet asset row, not an income statement operating expense.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset row, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded COGS ('Materials and Services'), D&A, impairments, and totals/subtotals. Did not include the supplemental R&D amortization line because amortization is explicitly excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only R&D-related income statement row in candidates, but it is amortization of capitalized R&D, not a dedicated R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset row, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is present on the income statement. The only R&D-related row is amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not the operating R&D expense requested. Therefore mapped as missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; preferred core financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest expense; should be included with other recurring interest costs.
Can represent recurring finance costs, but may also include non-interest items; acceptable as additional recurring finance cost when no more granular split is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest expense, same values with opposite sign convention presentation; avoid double counting because core row already exists.
Not a finance cost.
Balance sheet equity row, not finance cost.
Balance sheet equity row, not finance cost.
Balance sheet liability classification, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring finance cost rows and excluded FX losses, derivatives, and total/net finance rows to avoid non-recurring items and double counting. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row because it duplicates the core lease interest line.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per rule to prefer parent/owners equity.
Would include non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent equity line exists.
This is minority interest, not book equity attributable to parent owners.
Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income measure, not equity stock.
Share count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected parent-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet non-controlling interest line.
Equivalent balance sheet label for minority interest; useful as alternate across periods.
Income statement attribution of earnings to NCI, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI labels as priority list; both represent minority interest and may vary by period.
